title: Wavey Hair
description: mod that lets your hair have physics
body:
This basic mod makes your Hair have physics! Like the mod Waveycapes, but for hair!

**To start**, press **_G_** **_(in some versions you may have to rebind it before it starts to work)_** and set a origin and connect that origin to some hair, the origin is the rotation point, and the hair is whats connected to it.

**Then**, name your preset (default "skin") and click **_Export_**. This will export a json and activate it.
